Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Today our guys are taking some liberties transforming a Jeep Wagoneer into a S-U-V performance beast!
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: HorsePower builds a '97 sleeper Thunderbird
Video.title: Project Deep Sleep

Video.summary: Project Deep Sleep gets a horsepower wake-up call.
Video.title: Deep Sleep's Engine Build

Video.summary: Fox body Mustangs are highly prized and Ford fans will love this build!
Video.title: Fox Body Mustang Sydewinder

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: Today we’ll show you the 5 most common reasons your engine won’t start...and how to fix it!
Video.title: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Image.alt: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Video.summary: The "Split-Bumper Thumper" gets tubs for bigger tires, along with an easy-to-install roll cage.
Video.title: Triple Threat Camaro: Interior

Video.summary: Our split-bumper Camaro receives a hand-crafted exhaust, designed by one of Magnaflow's own.
Video.title: Triple Threat Exhaust

Video.summary: It's down to the wire, as we ready our Camaro race car for the track.
Video.title: Triple Threat Completion

Video.summary: With over 600 horses the Gen II Camaro is ready to pound the pavement!
Video.title: 600+ Horsepower 2nd Gen Camaro Shakedown

Video.summary: We bring in a 2001 ragged out BMW 4 door sedan, with plans of turning it into a mix-use race machine.
Video.title: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Image.alt: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Video.summary: We pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast.
Video.title: Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Video.summary: "Deep Sleep" gets a wake-up call from a new 610-horsepower engine.
Video.title: Deep Sleep Engine Drop

Video.summary: "Deep Sleep" fires up for HorsePower payoff.
Video.title: Deep Sleep - Final Touches

Video.summary: Everybody loves old school hot rods, and our ’49 Ford is one sweet treat.
Video.title: Banana Split

Video.summary: The Carcass guys continue the build of their grassroots BMW race car.
Video.title: Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Video.summary: Our 2001 BMW race car gets a set of coilovers, as well as big brake upgrade.
Video.title: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Image.alt: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Video.summary: Project UnSanctioned gets the roll cage painted and then back to the shop for a stylistic wrap.
Video.title: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Image.alt: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Video.summary: The Carcass crew invites a few friends out for a day on the trails.
Video.title: Off-Road Excursion

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete
